name: Echoblast HQ
notes: Headquarters. Lease runs through 2030 with 5-year renewal.

name: EBL-VA1
notes: First owned DC. H100 initial fleet. Peak 2400 GPUs.

name: EBL-VA2
notes: Second DC. Equinix lease non-renewal 2033 (won't extend past 2035). Replacement site search Manassas VA.

name: EBL-OR1
notes: Third DC. US West Coast. Site of Aug 2032 14-hour UPS outage (root cause misattributed publicly).

name: EBL-NV1
notes: Fourth DC. Jun 2029 cooling-system leak (180 GPUs damaged). H200 + Blackwell.

name: EBL-EU1
notes: First EU DC. 40MW provisioned, 60MW expansion approved 2033. EU data-sovereignty failover incident Apr 2032.

name: EBL-NV2
notes: Sixth DC. Second US Western site.

name: EBL-EU2
notes: Second EU DC. EU data-residency offering.

name: Seattle Engineering Office
notes: Pacific Northwest hub, DC-OR1 operations team.

name: Amsterdam Office
notes: EU sales and customer-success functions. Opened alongside EBL-EU1.
